title: Lucky Bingo Plastic Markers (14cm x 1.5cm) Pack of 6 - Assorted Colors (Red, Blue, Black), Perfect for Bingo Nights, Games, & More
features: VIBRANT VARIETY: This lucky bingo markers pack comes with 6 vibrant markers in assorted colors, red, blue, and black, adding a splash of color to any bingo night or game session.
QUALITY CONSTRUCTION: Crafted from durable plastic, these markers are designed to last through countless games, ensuring your bingo nights are never short on color or fun.

PRECISION DABBING: Featuring a rounded sponge nib, these markers measures 14cm x 1.5cm provide smooth, precise dabbing for clear and visible markings on your bingo cards, enhancing gameplay and avoiding mismatches.

PERFECT FOR ALL OCCASIONS: Whether it’s a family game night, a special event, or just a casual bingo session with friends, these markers are perfect for any occasion and guarantee an enjoyable gameplay experience every time.
MULTIPURPOSE USE: Not just perfect for bingo, these versatile markers can be used for a variety of games and activities, making them a must-have in your game night arsenal.
description: Use this item for any events that can be reused for the next season.
